title: THE 2PM CLUB™ BIRMINGHAM - 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
description: Birmingham, it's your turn to discover why The 2PM Club is sweeping the Midlands. Four hours of 80s, 90s and 00s anthems hit The Mill with full club production — think confetti cannons, epic singalongs, and every iconic tune you still know by heart. No "maybe next time" excuses, no 2 AM taxis, just pure fun at the perfect time of day. You'll belt Whitney, bounce to Oasis, and finish the night buzzing, not broken. This is daytime disco done properly.
